name: Basic Biscuit Crust
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cup Unbleached or whole wheat pastry flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, salt (if desired), baking powder, and baking soda into a large bowl.
2. Using a pastry blender or fork, cut the margarine into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse meal.
3. In a measuring cup, combine soy milk and honey or syrup.
4. Add the liquid mixture to the flour mixture, stirring with a fork to form a stiff dough. If the dough is too dry, add more soy milk.
5. Lightly knead in the bowl for 3 to 5 minutes until the dough is no longer sticky.
6. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and roll out into the desired shape.
7. Makes enough crust to cover a 9- by 12-inch baking pan.
8. Per serving: 128 calories; 4 grams protein; 3 grams fat; 21 grams carbohydrate; 0 cholesterol; 211 milligrams sodium; 1 gram fiber; vegan
Adapted from Vegetarian Times, Nov 93/MM by DEEANNE
